app_subtitle: Discover which party truly represents you
divergence_tooltip: Difference between what the party says and how it votes
intro_description: Answer {{total}} questions on key Israeli policy issues and discover which party and MKs are closest to your views.
intro_note: Questions cover 6 topics: security, religion & state, economy, rule of law, minority rights, and governance. You can skip any question you prefer not to answer.
priorities_subtitle: Select how important each topic is — this will affect your match scores.
priorities_skip: All topics are equally important to me
weight_section_title: How important is each topic to you?
hypocrisy_title: How consistently do parties vote their platform?
hypocrisy_subtitle: Score 100 = platform fully matches votes. Score 0 = maximum divergence. Click a party for details.
similarity_subtitle: Closer parties share similar policy positions. Distance computed across all 28 questions.
mk_matches_subtitle: Based on voting records from Knessets 22–24
mk_compass_subtitle: Explore how individual MKs voted across all questions
mk_variance_subtitle: How much do MKs within the same party diverge in their votes?
mk_crossaisle_subtitle: MKs whose voting record most resembles a different party.
mk_map_subtitle: Individual MK positions based on voted questions. Hover over a dot to see the MK's name.
mk_no_answers: Answer at least 5 survey questions to see your MK matches.
